description_long: This object is a vintage-style corded telephone featuring a combination of wood and black metal elements. The handset is supported by two ornate cradles, each with a cylindrical black and cream section, and is connected to a central base with a decorative stem. The base is rectangular and solid, with a rotary-style dial on the front, complete with visible finger holes and a central button. The wood grain is prominent on both the handset and the cradle supports, giving the phone a classic, antique appearance. The overall design is symmetrical, with the handset resting horizontally atop the cradles. The phone exudes an old-fashioned charm, reminiscent of early 20th-century telecommunication devices.
description: A vintage corded telephone with a wooden handset, black metal cradles, and a rotary dial on a solid rectangular base. The design is ornate and classic, evoking early 20th-century style.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the cylindrical wooden handset and the symmetrical cradles supporting it.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rotary dial, the ornate cradles, and the full width of the wooden handset.
description_view_2: Rear top-down view focusing on the back of the handset and the base, with less detail of the dial.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear of the base and the cradles, with the handset resting on top.
